dispositions.reason: Three competitive heterogeneous kernels cannot be formed behind the common ABI on available hardware, and no matched reproduction or transfer result exists.
The current open hybrid stress comparator requires at least 600 GB aggregate VRAM, while no strong matched dense baseline and candidate can run in the frozen local envelope.
Gated DeltaNet-2 displaced Mamba-3 as the dated reported frontier for the scoped envelope, but neither official CUDA-scale result can be reproduced on the non-CUDA host.
No single-kernel, routed, hybrid, oracle-router, random-router, and strong-generalist candidate set exists under matched assistance and lifecycle cost.
The defeat prediction is frozen, but OneCell has no implemented central cell, adapters, verifier, abstraction library, controls, training trace, or transfer workload to execute.
Equal-active-parameter and equal-total-lifecycle-cost views cannot be estimated without runnable candidates, matched hardware, energy or proxy measurements, and complete assistance accounting.
A bounded local lifecycle fixture exists, but no externally reproduced architecture candidate can enter shadow, canary, rollback, retirement, and descendant invalidation as an outcome-bearing system.

non_claims: No ASI Stack architecture candidate was compared.
No exact dominance or Pareto frontier is supported.
A reachable official repository is not a completed reproduction.
A smaller mechanism proxy would not satisfy the strongest-baseline gate.
Provider and paper results remain source-reported claims.
The result grants no deployment, publication, release, AGI, ASI, or SOTA authority.
